commands.name: build
commands.description: Build container images for shared resources

options.name: --ids
options.description: Resource IDs to build (builds all if omitted)

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the operation to run [default: False]

options.name: --global
options.description: Build all resources from global config [default: False]

options.name: --mode
options.description: Target mode: Container or Project (for non-interactive use)

commands.name: info
commands.description: Show detailed information about a shared resource

options.name: --id
options.description: The unique identifier of the resource

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a shared resource from an existing project or container

options.name: --image-name
options.description: Override container image name (default: project name)

options.name: --yes
options.description: Automatic yes to prompts; assume 'yes' as answer to all prompts and run non-interactively [default: False]

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the .csproj file, Dockerfile, or directory

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import shared resources from .aspire/settings.json files in the current git repository

options.name: --yes
options.description: Automatic yes to prompts; assume 'yes' as answer to all prompts and run non-interactively [default: False]

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the operation to run [default: False]

options.name: --id
options.description: The unique identifier of the resource

options.name: --yes
options.description: Automatic yes to prompts; assume 'yes' as answer to all prompts and run non-interactively [default: False]

options.name: --ids
options.description: Resource IDs to clear (clears all if omitted)

options.name: --include-repo
options.description: Also clear from repository settings (.aspire/settings.json) [default: False]

options.name: --yes
options.description: Automatic yes to prompts; assume 'yes' as answer to all prompts and run non-interactively [default: False]

commands.name: override
commands.description: Override configurations for shared resources for the current Git repository or globally
